summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification over ten open maintainer-owned PRs, plus one hydrated security-sensitive linked PR. No shared canonical was selected because the job is not a dedupe cluster. No merge, fix, or close mutations are planned; two PRs need explicit maintainer disposition, and #83440 is routed to central security handling.

actions.reason: Useful focused bug-fix PR related to stale auth profile SecretRefs, but draft state, failed proof, and review findings make it non-closable and non-mergeable in this plan shard.
Standalone diagnostics PR with broad-but-coherent scope; no hydrated duplicate or superseding canonical is clear enough for closure.
Possible supersession by merged plugin/doctor work needs maintainer or technical correctness judgment before closure because the open PR has useful code and an unresolved review finding.
Exec-approval-adjacent but non-security PR with useful implementation; draft and failed proof block merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout.
Likely candidate fix for the related session-binding bug, but active review state blocks merge or issue closeout in plan mode.
Related partial fix for group mention behavior, but not enough to close the broader hydrated issue or merge without proof.
Related catalog cleanup following #77269, but it is a separate product/catalog decision path and not a boring duplicate closeout.
Hydrated evidence points to supersession, but the existing maintainer-label disposition note requires explicit maintainer judgment before a close action.
Useful follow-up regression PR related to the already-merged plugin install fix, not a low-signal or duplicate PR to close in this shard.
Standalone broad draft PR that should stay on its own review path; no hydrated duplicate/superseding canonical is clear.
Security-sensitive linked PR is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup and must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling.

needs_human: #77559: decide whether the open config-diagnostics PR is truly superseded by merged #77613/#77502 despite useful code and an unresolved Codex review finding.
#78591: explicit maintainer disposition is required because hydrated evidence says it is superseded by #78456, but the existing ClawSweeper note says the maintainer label blocks cleanup closure.
